requirement.description: The engine controller shall periodically transmit the current engine coolant temperature value to support thermal monitoring by other ECUs.

test_cases.test_objective: Verify periodic transmission of engine coolant temperature.
Verify correct encoding of 0°C coolant temperature.

test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_ecm_eng_003(can_bus):
    msg = can_bus.recv(timeout=1.0)
    assert get_raw_temp(msg) == 0
    assert get_phys_temp(msg) == -40

def test_tc_ecm_eng_004(can_bus):
    msg = can_bus.recv(timeout=1.0)
    assert get_raw_temp(msg) == 255
    assert get_phys_temp(msg) == 215

test_cases.test_objective: Verify monotonic increase during rising temperature.
Verify reliability of periodic transmission over time.
test_cases.expected_result: No transmission gaps; minimum 16 frames received

test_cases.test_objective: Verify correct byte placement of temperature signal.
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_ecm_eng_009(can_bus):
    msg = can_bus.recv()
    assert len(msg.data) >= 7
    assert msg.data[6] == get_raw_temp(msg)

test_cases.test_objective: Verify integration consistency with forwarded signals.
test_cases.expected_result: ECM and gateway temperature values match
